시편 80:1.content: Hear us, Shepherd of Israel, you who lead Joseph like a flock, you who sit above the cherubim, shine out.

시편 80:2.content: Before Ephraim and Benjamin and Manasseh, stir up your might! Come to save us!

시편 80:3.content: Turn us again, God. Cause your face to shine, and we will be saved.

시편 80:4.content: Yahweh God of Armies, how long will you be angry against the prayer of your people?

시편 80:5.content: You have fed them with the bread of tears, and given them tears to drink in large measure.

시편 80:6.content: You make us a source of contention to our neighbors. Our enemies laugh among themselves.

시편 80:7.content: Turn us again, God of Armies. Cause your face to shine, and we will be saved.

시편 80:8.content: You brought a vine out of Egypt. You drove out the nations, and planted it.

시편 80:9.content: You cleared the ground for it. It took deep root, and filled the land.

시편 80:10.content: The mountains were covered with its shadow. Its boughs were like God’s cedars.

시편 80:11.content: It sent out its branches to the sea, its shoots to the River.

시편 80:12.content: Why have you broken down its walls, so that all those who pass by the way pluck it?

시편 80:13.content: The boar out of the wood ravages it. The wild animals of the field feed on it.

시편 80:14.content: Turn again, we beg you, God of Armies. Look down from heaven, and see, and visit this vine,

시편 80:15.content: the stock which your right hand planted, the branch that you made strong for yourself.

시편 80:16.content: It’s burned with fire. It’s cut down. They perish at your rebuke.

시편 80:17.content: Let your hand be on the man of your right hand, on the son of man whom you made strong for yourself.

시편 80:18.content: So we will not turn away from you. Revive us, and we will call on your name.

시편 80:19.content: Turn us again, Yahweh God of Armies. Cause your face to shine, and we will be saved.
